title: T-103 — UI: FA Commercial tab (fa_commercial_tab) — schema-driven form with V08 launch date rule
prompt:
# T-103 — FA Commercial tab UI (slice of T-025)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.5 + UX fa_commercial_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:559-586 (FACommercialTab)
Parent root: T-025

## Goal
Client component for FA Commercial dept rendering 7 fields (Launch Date, Department number, Article number, Bar codes GS1, Cases/week W1/W2/W3) with V08 rule: when `fa.brief_id` is present, Launch Date must be ≥ 24 weeks from Brief handoff and the earliest allowed date is shown. Uses buildDeptZod('Commercial') + updateFaCell per dirty field.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:559-586`
- closed_commercial badge in card-head (Yes → green Closed badge, else gray Open)
- When `fa.brief_id` present: blue Alert 'V08 · Launch Date must be ≥ 24 weeks from Brief handoff. Earliest: {earliest}'
- 7 fields in form-grid: Launch Date (date input), Department number, Article number, Bar codes GS1 (mono), Cases/week W1, W2, W3 (number)
- Save Commercial + Close Commercial section buttons

## Implementation contract
New `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/commercial-tab.tsx` 'use client'. RHF + zodResolver(buildDeptZod('Commercial')). `earliest` computed in server component from brief handoff date + 24 weeks; passed as prop. Save calls `updateFaCell` per dirty field; Server Action validates launch_date >= earliest if brief_id present. shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Button/Alert primitives; Bar codes uses mono font (font-mono).

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/commercial-tab.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/__tests__/commercial-tab.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the Commercial tab renders, when compared to fa-screens.jsx:559-586 (FACommercialTab), then it shows the 7 fields (Launch Date, Department number, Article number, Bar codes GS1, Cases W1/W2/W3) in correct order with closed_commercial badge, and uses shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Alert primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given `fa.brief_id` is present and the user enters a Launch Date earlier than `earliest`, when validating, then V08 alert is shown and the Server Action `updateFaCell` rejects the launch_date change with an explanatory error.
3. Given user edits Cases/week W1 and saves, when Server Action runs, then `updateFaCell` is called for `cases_week_1` only and the closed_commercial badge state is unchanged.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 RTL tests for 7-field parity, V08 launch-date rejection with brief_id, single-field save.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test commercial-tab`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement other tabs in this slice
- Do not bypass V08 (must validate launch_date >= earliest when brief_id present)
- Do not hardcode earliest date (derive from brief handoff + 24 weeks)
